Text_interviewer_participant: Okay Okay Sammy the family cat got out of the house Hes usually kept inside but he got out of the house And boy what fun it was to get out into the yard And he climbed the tree And the little girl in the house realized he was gone And she ran out into the yard And shes calling him which only scared him more So he went way out on a limb And she was freaking out and everything And then the dog heard her freaking out So the dog came out and started barking which made Sammy all the more scared So somebody dialed And oh no wait a minute Thats not quite true First dad came out to help Dad tried to help And so he climbed up the tree And he wasnt any better than Sammy Hes sitting there looking really woeful And hes not even on the limb of the tree The dog now barking at him as well Maybe hes not dad Maybe hes just a neighbor And hes afraid of that dog Thats possible too since the dog is barking at him But he had climbed up a ladder The ladder fell down And there he is Also I guess my story missed something too because the little girl came running out But she may have been out in the yard all the time playing with her tricycle because its still there near her But the firemen are coming And theres a bird on the opposite branch So the bird doesnt seem to be scared of the cat at all And the firemen will save the day They will get both dad and Sammy out of the tree I think there will be some discussion in the family afterwards about Sammy in the house what to do if theres an emergency if it was a good idea And maybe dad neighbor whoever you are dont climb a tree until you know it You know what youre doing Its the moral of the story
translated: Okay Okay Sammy the family cat got out of the house Hes usually kept inside but he got out of the house And boy what fun it was to get out into the yard And he climbed the tree And the little girl in the house realized he was gone And she ran out into the yard And shes calling him which only scared him more So he went way out on a limb And she was freaking out and everything And then the dog heard her freaking out So the dog came out and started barking which made Sammy all the more scared So somebody dialed And oh no wait a minute Thats not quite true First dad came out to help Dad tried to help And so he climbed up the tree And he wasnt any better than Sammy Hes sitting there looking really woeful And hes not even on the limb of the tree The dog now barking at him as well Maybe hes not dad Maybe hes just a neighbor And hes afraid of that dog Thats possible too since the dog is barking at him But he had climbed up a ladder The ladder fell down And there he is Also I guess my story missed something too because the little girl came running out But she may have been out in the yard all the time playing with her tricycle because its still there near her But the firemen are coming And theres a bird on the opposite branch So the bird doesnt seem to be scared of the cat at all And the firemen will save the day They will get both dad and Sammy out of the tree I think there will be some discussion in the family afterwards about Sammy in the house what to do if theres an emergency if it was a good idea And maybe dad neighbor whoever you are dont climb a tree until you know it You know what youre doing Its the moral of the story

Text_interviewer_participant: There was a family who had pets And the pets were a dog and a cat And they also had a bird but they didnt consider the bird to be theirs It was just a wild bird And one day the father went up into the tree because his daughter told him that the cat is up on the branch of the tree And the father went up to get the cat And he was stuck up there on a branch And he couldnt get down And his dog was barking And he was barking at him He felt like he shouldnt try to jump right down because he was too high And his ladder had fallen on the ground And he was afraid the dog was upset and would bite him anyway So the mother was looking out of the kitchen window and saw all this happening And she knew that her husband needed help So she called the fire department And the fire department raced there with their ladder so they could get the father down out of the tree And hopefully the cat too All right Thank you The end
translated: There was a family who had pets And the pets were a dog and a cat And they also had a bird but they didnt consider the bird to be theirs It was just a wild bird And one day the father went up into the tree because his daughter told him that the cat is up on the branch of the tree And the father went up to get the cat And he was stuck up there on a branch And he couldnt get down And his dog was barking And he was barking at him He felt like he shouldnt try to jump right down because he was too high And his ladder had fallen on the ground And he was afraid the dog was upset and would bite him anyway So the mother was looking out of the kitchen window and saw all this happening And she knew that her husband needed help So she called the fire department And the fire department raced there with their ladder so they could get the father down out of the tree And hopefully the cat too All right Thank you The end

Text_interviewer_participant: So a girl was out in her yard playing with her cat and the cat ran up a tree and went out on a branch and became frightened The cat doesnt know what to do It looks wideeyed and has a concerned look on its face The girl is underneath crying for the cat help help Apparently dad or some other adult has come out with the ladder climbed the tree but the ladder has fallen The ladder is on the ground and so the man is also stuck on the tree Theres a dog barking up the tree maybe which is why the cat is up there or why the Uh The cat is so concerned but the man looks a little disturbed because hes stuck up in the tree Theres an angrylooking barking dog below the tree His ladder is on the ground The bird in the tree is oblivious to it all Theres a bird there just singing away Maybe thats why the cat went up the tree in the first place to try to catch the bird But as a result of all the commotion somebody has called and the fire company has responded So we have two firefighters rushing toward the tree with another ladder and one presumes that the firefighters will at least rescue the cat and if theyre generous maybe they will also rescue dad help him down the tree as well So And theyll all live happily ever after and the bird will fly back to her nest and collect worms from the lawn The end
translated: So a girl was out in her yard playing with her cat and the cat ran up a tree and went out on a branch and became frightened The cat doesnt know what to do It looks wideeyed and has a concerned look on its face The girl is underneath crying for the cat help help Apparently dad or some other adult has come out with the ladder climbed the tree but the ladder has fallen The ladder is on the ground and so the man is also stuck on the tree Theres a dog barking up the tree maybe which is why the cat is up there or why the Uh The cat is so concerned but the man looks a little disturbed because hes stuck up in the tree Theres an angrylooking barking dog below the tree His ladder is on the ground The bird in the tree is oblivious to it all Theres a bird there just singing away Maybe thats why the cat went up the tree in the first place to try to catch the bird But as a result of all the commotion somebody has called and the fire company has responded So we have two firefighters rushing toward the tree with another ladder and one presumes that the firefighters will at least rescue the cat and if theyre generous maybe they will also rescue dad help him down the tree as well So And theyll all live happily ever after and the bird will fly back to her nest and collect worms from the lawn The end

Text_interviewer_participant: The family this is Norman Rockwell How wonderful Norman Rockwell wanted to tell us all the story about a family the McGees Dad had four wait a minute one two three four children Theres dad four children mom and grandma And theyre going out theyre traveling someplace And its going to be a long journey which is always difficult Youve got four kids youve got the dog everybodys all excited Mindy the little girl is chewing gum Shes all excited But Tim the oldest he can hardly wait Hes hanging out of the car window looking ahead can hardly wait until were going to get there Were going to get there Its going to be fun And Junior you know hes just at that impish age And nobodys paying any attention to him while hes making faces at the car behind them no less And grandma is sitting there stone silent Shes been through this These are grandchildren She did not have to react to them She just knew what was going to come Time passes The trip is longer The kids have asked a million times are we there yet Are we there yet Mindys still chewing bubble gum Oh my her cheeks must hurt The dog whos been looking out along with Tim to see exactly whats coming next is now content to rest his chin on the window ledge and just look at the passing scenery Tim is still looking forward and hes still awake which puts him in a lot better shape than a lot of them Junior in the back is half asleep Grandma sits there just the same She knew this This is how this was going to happen Dad is slumped over the wheel Hes losing energy His cigar is down to a stub His hat is on backwards because hes had it with the kids Oh gosh he wishes they were there too Mom has fallen asleep with the baby on her lap And hopefully they are close to their destination
